An '''unidentified [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]]''' was present at the [[Battle of Muunilinst/Legends|Battle of Muunilinst]]. The Neimoidian oversaw the battle along with other [[Muun/Legends|Muuns]] via hologram. He was captured along with [[San Hill/Legends|San Hill]] and the other Muuns after [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and the [[The Muunilinst 10|Muunilinst 10]] secured the [[InterGalactic Banking Clan/Legends|InterGalactic Banking Clan's]] command center. After he was arrested, he held the robe of a Muun while being taken onto a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] cruiser.<ref name="CW4" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] Avatars state that this Neimoidian is [[Nute Gunray/Legends|Nute Gunray]],<ref name="Hyperspace">{{SWArchive|url=hyperspace/about/news/news20031110.html|text=New Hyperspace Avatars: Clone Wars}}</ref> but [[Leland Chee]] has said he's never been named.<ref name="TT">{{SWBoards|url=thread.jspa?threadID=152583&start=900#15805386|thread=Holocron continuity database questions|user=[[Leland Chee|Tasty Taste]]|date=2006-10-18|time=11:47 AM}}</ref> He is the only Neimoidian to have appeared in the series.

This Neimoidian wears the same purple drape and miter<ref name="CW4" /> as that of [[Rune Haako/Legends|Rune Haako]] in ''[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|Attack of the Clones]]''.<ref name="AOTC">{{Film|II}}</ref>
